DES: Holding Cash that accrues interest. Can be collateral cash, or remaining cash after allocation.
Holding a Call, the right to buy 100 shares of underlying at strike price on expiry date close
Writing a Call, take on the obligation to sell 100 shares of underlying at strike price on expiry date close
Holding a Put, the right to sell 100 shares of underlying at strike price on expiry date close
Writing a Put, take on the obligation to buy 100 shares of underlying strike price at expiry date close
Holding underlying shares, and writing calls on the held shares. Write 1 Call per 100 shares to cover for the possibility of the obligation to sell 100 shares at expiry date close
Replicate the position of holding underlying equity by holding a call and writing a put at the same strike and expiry.
Hold both a call and a put on underlying with the same expiry date and different OTM strikes. Capitalizes on significant volatility and price movements in either direction
Write both a call and a put on underlying with the same expiry date and different OTM strikes. Capitalizes on little volatility and price movements in either direction
Consists of 2 spreads, a Bull Call Spread and a Bear Put Spread. Profits from higher volatility.
COLLATERAL: Cash =  Qty * 100 shares* Max[Puts Strike Difference, Calls Strike Difference]

DES: Consists of 2 spreads, a Bear Call Spread and a Bull Put Spread. Profits from low volatility.
COLLATERAL: Cash =  Qty * 100 shares* Max[Puts Strike Difference, Calls Strike Difference]

DES: Hold a call and write one for the same expiry date, at different strike prices. The Bull Call Spread has short call with the higher strike price and profits from an increase in the underlying price.
COLLATERAL: Cash = Qty * 100 shares * (Higher Strike - Lower Strike)

DES: Hold a call and write one for the same expiry date, at different strike prices. The Bear Call Spread has short call with the lower strike price and profits off of a flat or moderate decline in underlying price.
COLLATERAL: Cash = Qty * 100 shares * (Higher Strike - Lower Strike)

DES: Hold a put and write one for the same expiry date at different strike prices. The Bull Put Spread has short put with the higher strike price and profits from a flat or moderate increase in underlying price.
COLLATERAL: Cash = Qty * 100 shares * (Higher Strike - Lower Strike)

DES: Hold a put and write one for the same expiry date at different strike prices. The Bear Put Spread has short put with the lower strike price and profits from a slow decline in underlying price.
COLLATERAL: Cash = Qty * 100 shares * (Higher Strike - Lower Strike)
